$comment: Module manifest — the contract between this module and the Jarvis core (Plugin Architecture / Separation of concerns). Status 'planned': structurally valid scaffold for a future capability. Routes through the Image Provider Abstraction (IMAGE_PROVIDER) — no provider specifics hardcoded.
name: Image Assistant
description: Generates images via the Image Provider Abstraction (IMAGE_PROVIDER, default openai descriptor). Refines a user request into a provider-neutral generation spec, then routes the spec through the resolved provider.

envVars.name: IMAGE_ASSISTANT_ENABLED
envVars.description: Set to 'true' to enable this module's workflow.

envVars.name: IMAGE_PROVIDER
envVars.description: Selects the image provider descriptor under config/providers/image/ (e.g. openai).

envVars.name: IMAGE_MODEL
envVars.description: Model id for the selected provider (read from the provider descriptor).

envVars.name: OPENAI_IMAGE_API_KEY
envVars.description: API key for the OpenAI image provider (falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY). Stored only in .env; never in workflows.
